SMILE INDEX: 21
WINDOW: 382.133s to 417.800s (smile at 402.133s to 402.800s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[157.080-434.930] interviewee: name for the medical corps was SAT, Sanitary. When they brought SAP, SAP are the sappers. And I had to serve for two years with the pioneers building bridges and pontoons. And we learned how to mine bridges and highways. And I couldn't get out. I tried a few times to change. But it was impossible. I had to stay

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
pontoons.
